calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Stevie McDonald appearing in person for Penelope Taylor (Petitioner).
Robert White appearing via zoom for Adam Erlach (objector).

Discussion was held in regard to the second supplement, that proof of service was filed yesterday, and the fees claimed by Mrs. McDonald. Waiver on account and report of administrator with will annexed etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Svahlin: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Continued To Aug-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Continued To Jul-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Stevie Jo McDonald appearing via zoom for (Administrator) Penelope Taylor.
Robert White appearing via zoom for (Beneficiary) Adam Erlach.

Ms. McDonald stated that she filed Inventory and Appraisal on April 5th and that she also filed a petition on waiver of accounting and final distribution with a filing date of June 13th. Status on close of estate is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stevie Jo McDonald, via ZOOM, for Penelope Taylor, Petitioner; Robert White, via ZOOM, for Adam Erhlach, Interested Party; Michael Jones, via ZOOM, Beneficiary.

The court confirms that it intends to grant the petition as the petitioner has provided the court with enough information to rebut presumption. The court confirms with Messrs. White and Jones that neither of them are appearing to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The lost will dated Oct-31-1976 is admitted to probate. Penelope Taylor is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $178,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-11-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before Apr-04-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Continued To Mar-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Continued To Feb-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stevie Jo McDonald, via ZOOM, for Penelope Taylor, Petitioner; Robert White, via ZOOM, for Adam Erlach, Beneficiary, Michael Jones, via ZOOM, Interested Party.

The court reminds the parties that without any IAEA authority, assets cannot be marshalled. Ms. McDonald advises that the proposed order submitted to the court requests appointment with full authority and a blocked account but that she will obtain a bond if required. The court advises counsel that the issue is that the petition did not request full IAEA authority. Ms. McDonald advises that she did request full IAEA authority, which is confirmed by the court, but she is advised that one box has been left unchecked and the issue remains. Ms. McDonald requests to move forward without IAEA authority. Mr. White reports that he is not objecting if there is a bond, or a blocked account ordered. The court advises that it is inclined to require a bond. Ms. McDonald advises that she intends to amend the petition re-notice, accordingly.

The Petition for Letters of Administration with will annexed is continued to Feb-15-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Continued To Nov-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Continued To Nov-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stevie Jo McDonald, via ZOOM, for Penelope Taylor, Petitioner; Robert White, via ZOOM, for Adam Erlach, Interested Party.

Mr. White reports that he is not appearing to object to the petition but to confirm that the proposed order being signed by the court includes that the Administrator is ordered to deposit funds into a blocked account. Ms. McDonald advises that she will be submitting an updated proposed order to the court. The court instructs Ms. McDonald to submit the updated order to the assigned Examiner via email with a summary of today's proceedings and cc Mr. White. The court subsequently provides Ms. McDonald the assigned Examiner's email address.

The Petition for Letters of Administration to Nov-02-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Oct-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
